signals.headline: Ethereum Reaches $2,358
signals.raw:
Ethereum Reaches $2,358.26 on April 17 | UP | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum climbed $14.86 from the previous day to $2,358.26[1], continuing a recovery from early 2026's sharp decline caused by recession concerns and Vitalik Buterin's ETH sales[1].

signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | MED confidence**

Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with Massive Volume | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The top Tweet Markets market, "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?", shows 88% odds on 300-319 tweets, backed by $28.4M in volume across 28 active markets, indicating heavy trader focus on Musk's X activity as of April 17.[4]
